raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſa Iuhda ſtahwe-
ja ta KUNGĀ Preetschā / ir
wiꝫnu Behruini/ wiꝫnu See-
waz/ un wiꝫnu Dehli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze ta KUNGA
Gars Drandsibas Widdū pahr
Jeasiēlu Sakarija Dehlu/ ta
Dehla Benaja/ tā Dehla Jeie-
la/ Matanija Dehla/ to Lewitu
no Affawa Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Ÿazzija: Klansaj-
tees wiſſa Iuhda / un juhs Je-
rusalemes Eedſihwotaji/ un tu
Kehnisch Josawats/ ta ſakka
tas KUNGS us jums: Ne bih-
ſteetees un ne iſbailojeetees
preekſch ſcho leelu Pulku / jo tas
Karsch ne peederr jums/ bet Dee-
wain.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zelleetees rihtu pretti teem
us leiju/ rangi/ tee nahk us ang-
fchu pee tahs uſkahpjamas Wee-
tas no Ziz/un juhs atraffeet tohs
pee tahs Uppeß Needreem
preekſch tahs Tukſneses Jerueles.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Juhs ſchinni Rautchanā
ne buhs jakanjahs / eita tikcai
flaht/ ſtahweet / un raugajt ta
KUNGA Peſtſchannu/ kas ar
juhs irr. Iuhda un Jerusale-
me ne bihſteetees/ un ne iſbailo-
jeetees/ iſetta rihtu winneem
pretti/ jo tas KUNG S buhs
ar jums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad lohztjahs Josawats
ar ſawu Waigu pee Semines /
un wiſſa Iuhda un Jerusalemes
hwotaji mettehs pee Sem-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Lewitti no t
Rāititeeu Behrneem / un no
Koriteeu Behrneem / zehlehs
KUNGII Israēta Deevu
ſkannigu Balſi augſti flawe-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee zehlehs itt agu
un iſgahje us to Tukſnesi
kon/ un teem iſeiioht ſtahnu
Josawats / un Ÿazzija: Klan-
manni/ Iuhda un Jerusale-
Eedſihwotaji / tizzeet eeſch
KUNGII juhsu Deevu/tad ju
paſtahweſeet/ tizzeet wiꝫnu P-
weefcheem / tad juhs labbi
dohſees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſch nehme Pad-
nu ar teem Landim/ un eeze
Dseedatajus preekſch to KU-
GU/ ka tee wiꝫnu ſwehtu A-
ſtibu flawetu / to Apbrunn-
Preeſchā eedami/ un Ÿazzida-
Teizeet to KUNGU / jo wi-
Schehlaſtiba paleek muhſchig-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un to Brihdi/ kad tee ta-
preezigas un teizamas Dse-
mas ſahze/ tad greefe tas KUNG
ſtohs/ kas fleppeni turrejahs pr-
teem Ammona Behrneem/ M-
abu un teem no ta Kalna Se-
kas prett Iuhdu bija nahkuſch-
ka tee (ſawā Starpā) noſ-
wahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo Ammona Behrni
Moabs zehlehs pretti teem
oſihwotajeem no ta Kalna Se-
isdeſdami un nomaitadami/
tad tee tohs Seira Eedſihwo-
jus wiſſai bij nokawuſchi / t-
pal
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
